title: Fluffy Spicy Festive Chili Stir-fry
description: A festive Chinese dish featuring glace cherries and a spicy kick, perfect for adding some color to your dinner table with its festive flair.
instructions: Preheat your pressure cooker to high heat.
Add oil and garlic to the pot, sautéing for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Add chili flakes and ginger to the pot, cooking for another minute.
Pour in soy sauce and fish sauce, stir well to combine with spices.
Gradually pour in vegetable broth or water while continuously stirring to prevent sticking. Allow mixture to simmer for about 5 minutes.
Finally add glace cherries and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes until heated through and the liquids have slightly reduced.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course, garnished with fresh cilantro if desired.
